original: You ask Syri what she’s reading lately, gesturing towards her data slate. The ausar shrugs, “Some [rand |shitty historical fiction I got on Congo. It’s set on the dzaan homeworld, about the first contact with Confederate colonists... but somehow the author’s turned it into this planetary romance with swashbuckling on a gas giant and there’s a good alpha and an evil alpha competing for the same beta. For some reason; she’s not exactly a catch... though I guess ‘biggest breeding hips’ counts for something. Seriously, that’s the plot. She picked the most interesting period in a whole planet’s history and turned it into a bodice ripper adventure. Ugh. |weird historical drama I got for free off public domain, about something called the ‘War of 1812’ on Terra. I had to read a whole wiki page just to figure out the context... the author really did a terrible job setting it up. Then again I think this book is like two thousand years old. Anyway it’s about some country getting invaded by its former suzerain or something, at least it’s trying to be, but most of the time it’s just some plantation damsel pining after an army officer who’s gone to fight. I wish I could care if he lives or not, but like, his defining character trait is his chest hair and square chin. Ugh. |really cool retro-future adventure I picked up on Congo, about the first War in the Stars — that’s when the first ausar star-kings opened the Warp Gates and immediately proceeded to blast each other back to the stone age. God, can you believe just about the first thing to go through the gates were nukes? We’re the worst. What makes it worse is I think this was written before the war, and this poor bastard just predicted it when the Gates were still being built. It’s amazing, but... man it’s depressing. |non-fiction book about the first contact with the galotians. It’s really interesting — nobody realized the galo-babes were even sentient for years, thought they were just monsters outta one of Kaede’s favorite RPGs. Of course, the goos didn’t make it easy, what with eating people to death a bunch. The book’s actually written by a galotian, one of the daughters of Galos, about her mother’s long struggle to understand meat-sacks like us and make contact. Well, I say ‘her mother’ but I guess it’s really herself a few splits back... I wonder how identity gets passed between galotians anyway; are all of Galos’s daughters just Galos two-point-oh or what? Ugh, my head. ] I need to go back to reading Sci-Fi or something...” You chuckle at that, mentioning that you’re all practically living Science Fiction. Or at least, the sci-fi of yesteryear. “Yeah, that’s why I stopped reading it. Every time someone would put out a new idea, it was reality a couple years later. Takes the imagination out of everything when I figure, ‘hey, my sister could make that.’ I can just imagine what the guy who wrote Dark Space Revelation thought when the warp gates opened. Those were the books that inspired them, and the first gates were built in the author’s lifetime. There’s a statue of him in the square of Capital Bay back home.” You ask Syri to tell you a little bit about the gates — her race’s crowning achievement. She shrugs lightly sipping at her drink. “Hey, I’m not exactly an expert: you want to know the deep quantum physics shit, talk to my sister. She’s a genius about warp gates and wormholes and stuff. I’m just a dumb grunt. But hey, thank all the gods for the gates. Without them, I’d never have met you,” she grins, giving you an affectionate wink. “But back to reading... so, what’re you into these days, [syri.isLover |babe |cap ]? Any good reads lately?”
context: <<POS:12244058>> textify(['\\n\\tYou ask Syri what she’s reading lately, gestur'...])

original: You remember Syri was an engineer on Mhen’ga — does she ever miss that line of work at all? “Miss my old gig? Eh. I mean, I was damn good at it! I spent eight years in the Royals learning how to be the best, and a bunch of time civvy contracting after... got a whole degree and everything. But do I miss it? I don’t know. As much as I complained about how boring and repetitive the stuff I did was, cuz it was mostly prefabs y’know, there was this real sense that I was helping people. Connecting places on frontier worlds, bringing clean water to places and helping with sanitation. It was hard, dirty work most days, but you’d be shocked how many people even in Rush Twelve worlds still don’t have basic infrastructure.” She chuckles. “Well, maybe a Planet Rusher like you wouldn’t be surprised... but even with how hostile the natives sometimes were on Mhen’ga, the villages that would let us come and help them, we were building aqueducts and roads — in the middle of building the huge bridge to cross a gap so naleen could actually come to Esbeth from across this valley in the north of town. I guess... on a purely personal level I love what I’m doing now, but it was nice to really make a difference in peoples’ lives. That’s not a perspective I ever really had when I was doing it, but now that I’m not, I can see that I was doing some real good. At least once in a while.” You wonder, with an attitude like that — would she ever think of going back? “Nope,” she answers flatly. “Thing about being a concrete conjurer is that you kinda got to stay in one place, and you... you’re going all over the galaxy. I know it’s selfish, but I’d rather be on your crew any day.” You lean in and give Syri a [syri.isLover |big ol’ kiss |big hug ]. You’re glad to have her around, too, as long as she’s happy. Maybe when this adventure of yours is over, and you’ve settled into Steele Tech, she can consider taking up a post with the company’s engineers? “Heh, yeah, maybe!” she says, tail swishing in your lap. “But let’s not count our eggs before they hatch, captain. From where I’m sitting, you’ve still got a ways to go... and I’m not queen of the whole gaming circuit yet. No quitting before everyone in the galaxy is officially my bitch.” Attagirl.
context: <<POS:12251462>> textify(['\\n\\tYou remember Syri was an engineer on Mhen’ga —'...])

context: <> addButton(o++,"Streaming",(function(){aM(),output(textify(CE||(CE=(0,m.Z)([" Time to talk Syri’s favorite subject: how’s her pro-gamer-girl career coming along? “Doin’ great, actually!” she answers, giving you her most wolfish grin. “The momentum from that tourney on Uveto’s stil...

original: Time to talk Syri’s favorite subject: how’s her pro-gamer-girl career coming along? “Doin’ great, actually!” she answers, giving you her most wolfish grin. “The momentum from that tourney on Uveto’s still holding strong. Ever since I started streaming, subs are just pouring in... it feels like its own kind of high score I’m trying to figure out how to maximize. What games do I play, how long to go at once, how to interact with my... my audience? I don’t know that I like that word... maybe just fans, or anonymous friends. I dunno.” So what’s she been doing lately on the road to galactic stardom? [rand |“Well, I’ve been grinding a lot of Call of Valor lately... that franchise has always been my bread and butter, and it’s what got all this started. I think most people just come to see me own kids at CoV, honestly, so it’s no surprise that gets the most views. Plus, you know, most popular game franchise in the galaxy. I’m only getting better with every season, so as long as I keep practicing, I know I’m gonna keep dominating!” |Syri gives a wistful little sigh. “I really don’t want to get pigeonholed into ‘that CoV bitch’ so I’ve been trying to make time to play other things than just shooters. I like all sorts of games — pretty much anything other than puzzle games or sports stuff. So I’m trying out a dedicated day every week just for me to play some other stuff: mostly RPGs. I figure if I play one day a week for half a year I might finish a whole game one of these days. Of course, people keep pestering me to play horror games... think I’ll scream and freak out just cuz I’m a girl. But I am the woooorst case scenario for horror devs, I just speedrun them and laugh at the monsters. Pfft.” |“Weeeeell,” she drawls, kicking her legs, “I’m trying to do more co-op stuff. Mostly CoV, but some other streamers have invited me on their shows already! That’s really nice of them... everyone’s been so friendly. I’m not saying I cried a little after the first time, but maybe I did. Just a bit. It’s kind of overwhelming, the way people have just accepted me into the community. I finally feel like there’s somewhere I belong.” Other than on your ship, she means. “Other than that. I know I’ve always got a place with you, [syri.isMarried |my darling [pc.mf |husband |wife ] |cap ].” Damn right she does. |“You know, from what I’ve read nobody really watches MMO streamers unless that’s all you stream — what people get out of fetishizizing crafting for eight hours a day, I’ll never know. But I kind of want to try it! Back in high school I used to be in a pretty big PVP guild on Galaxy of Adventure, and after the tourney my old guild leader got back in touch. It was really sweet — he didn’t even try asking me to come back, just wrote to let me know everyone was super hyped for me. It’d be pretty fun to cruise back to some old multiplayer games and see if I’ve still got it. I just hope my subscribers won’t mind too much...” |“I’ve been thinking lately... what if I did some kind of event where I played games with people that sub to me? It might be kinda chaotic, and I’d have to do some kind of raffle to see who gets into any one game... but that seems like a cool way to give back to the people that’re supporting me. Probably more fun than playing with total randos, too. After all, you wouldn’t believe how many people just ask if they can hop in a game with you in chat... and I guess there’s no reason to say no, is there?” ] [syri.isLewdStreamer |Sidling up a little closer, and finding something soft and sensitive on your pup to grope, you ask how her more salacious streams having been going. Syri’s cheeks darken, but her wolven grin only spreads. “Hey, I’m not exactly a full-time camgirl here... but you and I have certainly made some heads turn. I mean, a smokin’ hot gamer-girl like me and a [pc.mf |ruggedly handsome captain |drop-dead gorgeous babe ] like you are definitely worth a few extra subs. And hey, now that I’ve age-gated myself, whenever I get horny while I work I can just whip it out and ask which of my subs wishes she was there to suck. Call ‘em good boys and girls for watchin’ me stroke. God they go wild for that shit. But it’s way more fun when it’s the two of us.” Syri leans in and gives you a kiss, sliding a hand up your [pc.chest]. “You’re welcome to come in and steal my stage any time you want, [syri.isMarried |my love |captain ],” she whispers, voice husky in your ears. “Show the whole galaxy who [syri.isHellhound |my favorite bitch is |has total control of my joystick ]. They’ll eat it up... watching me eat you up.” Careful, girl, or she might need to boot that stream up right now. “Don’t threaten me with a good time, cap,” Syri growls, nipping at your neck. “I’m always ready for you. And our audience is hungry for more...” ]

original: Don’t think I’m upset about it anything, though... you know Anno and I didn’t get on great when we were dumb tweens, but now that I’ve had some time to calm down — and Anno’s not trying to be queen bee of ausar high society all the time — it’s actually kind of nice hanging out with her more often. She’s nowhere near as annoying as when we were little. [syri.dornaWincest |And fucking hell did she get hot while I was away in the service. Oh fuck those curves, the way she jiggles when she walks in those heels... aahhhhh! You have no idea how hard it is for me not to just constantly be groping all over her. I get one whiff of that horny bitch and I’m close to bursting through my zipper.” Your lewd puppy-sluts do having amazing bodies, it’s true. And, cupping one of Syri’s boobs, you can say you’re happy you don’t have to be quite so reserved as she does. “Mmmf. It’s not my fault [pc.hasCock |that all I want out of life is to be ass-to-ass with my big sis while you fuck us raw. I’m a good girl most of the time, I swear... |that you two drive me so crazy! All I want to do is just push you both into a bed, watch you make out and finger each other before I rawdog you. Is that so much to ask? ]” You just smile and feel her up, teasing a pert nipple until Syri just can’t contain herself. Your ravenette slutpuppy shoves you down into the bed and starts kissing you, all but humping at your [pc.leg] through her clothes. Oh, Syri... |I actually really like bein’ around her... heck, I hope that bein’ on the ship together helps us get a little closer still. We’re twins, you know, we ought to be thick as thieves.[anno.isHuskar | Though Anno has enough thickness for the both of us and then some now. God damn she looks great. I just wanna bury my face in all of her and stay there forever... ]” ] | [rand |“My brainiac twin sister’s doing okay. At least, that’s what she says. There used to be a time when Anno was on track to be the belle of Ausari high society — we’re distant cousins of the Star King of Ausaril, you know, and our family was also kind of a big deal... but Anno was really something. You ask me, that girl could have married a king if she wanted. Maybe the king... and that always drove me nuts. She was older by a few seconds, but that meant she’d inherit the family fortune and titles and all the glory. And boy did she know it, too.” Syri sighs, leaning back. “But I guess while I was in the service, she just decided... ‘nah fuck it’ and went balls-deep into the sciences. Wanted to recreate our family’s former glory and be the next great warp field theorist, find a way to let ships transit between systems without Gates. Could have been amazing, if the government hadn’t gotten involved. Ever since, she’s been almost as aimless as me, working for mega-corps and slutting around like she’s a college kid again. Like all the ambition just drained out of her. I hope it’s not cuz of the accident... I’d feel awful if Anno’s just been spinning her wheels all this time because of what happened to me. Just cuz I’m a fuckup doesn’t mean she’s gotta be, too.” [syri.isMarried |Hey now, you didn’t marry no fuckup. |From where you’re standing, Syri doesn’t seem like that much of a fuckup at all. She’s really gotten her shit together, in fact, since your met. ] “Aww, you’re sweet. But still, compared to what our parents wanted for us... I can’t help feeling like just a little bit of a disappointment. Hey, at least I’m happy, though. Can’t say that for most rich wastes of space.” |“Y’know, I was just talking to Anno’s cutie-patootie girlfriend the other day. I’m glad we’ve all gotten back in touch recently... Kaede’s a real sweetheart. I’ve had my suspicions they were gonna end up together permanently ever since Anno was in college, and boy do they make a cute couple even after all this time. I’ve made some not-too-subtle hints to Red that she needs to pop the question already, cuz they’re not getting any younger and somebody needs to take the heat off me from the folks asking about grandbabies. Ugh, seriously... it’s like every time I call home now.” Seems like she’s a big fan of Kaede! “What’s not to love? She’s cute, sweet, hard-working, family-oriented, reliable to a fault. And she sleeps around as much as Anno, so it’s not like they’re gonna get all jealous and catty with each other cuz neither of ‘em can keep it in their pants. Not judgin’, just sayin’. They’re good for each other, and I like Kaede just on her own anyway.[syri.isLover | | Maybe I ought to tell Anno that if she doesn’t tie that knot, I’ll just sweep Kaede up for myself. That’ll show her. ]” |“Yeah, actually, I just got off the horn with my parents right before you came in. It’s... nice, reconnecting with them lately. Somehow after all the shit I put them though growing up, they still keep showering me in love. And asking me when they’re getting some grandbabies. Really, I think I’m just being used!” Syri snickers, flopping back on her bed. “I’m kidding. Mostly. But you know, my family’s kind of a big deal back on the homeworld. Pseudo-nobility, y’know. Anno was the family’s rising star, but we’re both in our late twenties now with no heirs on the horizon. I guess I can understand the folks being a little upset — who’s going to inherit their fat stacks of Warp Gate money and all their fancy properties? I mean, certainly not me, cuz Anno squirted out of mom a few seconds earlier than I did. Maybe it’s some senior-age hormonal thing... I hear it happens to everyone’s parents. Heck, your dad built you that huge nursery thing, right? That’s pretty obvious statement of intent if I ever saw one.” Yeah, your dad wasn’t exactly the subtle type. “I know the feeling.” ] ]

Sorry ‘bout that, was just checking in with my parents.
